title: GunsMod
description:
【English】 This mod adds simple and powerful guns to make your experience more exciting! Defeat mobs from a distance and stay safe at night with these high-performance weapons.

⚠️ Important Note
Creative Mode Only: These guns currently do not have crafting
body:
This mod adds simple and powerful guns to make your survival more exciting! Defeat mobs from a distance and stay safe at night.

Features:

High damage and satisfying sound effects.

Survival-friendly crafting recipes.

How to use:

Hold ammo in your inventory and right-click the gun to fire!

Credits: Sound effects: Sound Effect Lab (https://soundeffect-lab.info/)
